SEARCH
Package me.kevinboone.jgemini.base

Interface DownloadTarget

All Known Implementing Classes:
ApplicationDownloadTarget, FileDownloadTarget
public interface DownloadTarget
A DownloadTarget controls where a Download sends its data to. A target might be a file or a media player, perhaps other things.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    canOpenLocation()
    Returns true if it makes sense to offer the user the choice to show the target location.
    void
    close()
    It's important that the close() method close _all_ resources, particularly threads.
    void
    delete()
    Delete the target, if it makes sense.
    String
    getDisplayName()
    Get a name to show the user.
    OutputStream
    open()
    Prepare the target to accept data.
    void
    openLocation()
    If it makes sense to do so, show the storage location of the target.

  • Method Details

    • canOpenLocation

      boolean canOpenLocation()
      Returns true if it makes sense to offer the user the choice to show the target location. It will if it's a local file.

    • close

      void close()
      It's important that the close() method close _all_ resources, particularly threads.

    • delete

      void delete()
      Delete the target, if it makes sense. Often it won't.

    • getDisplayName

      String getDisplayName()
      Get a name to show the user. 'null' is never a good choice.

    • open

      OutputStream open() throws IOException
      Prepare the target to accept data.
      Throws:
      IOException

    • openLocation

      void openLocation()
      If it makes sense to do so, show the storage location of the target.
